reference: Good morning everyone. Let us start our weekly sync. Sarah, can you give us an update on the transcription pipeline? Sure. We have completed the WebSocket integration between the orchestration and transcription services. The streaming pipeline is now working end to end on both Apple Silicon and CUDA. That is great progress. What about the translation module? Translation is working with Ollama locally. We are using Qwen three point five with no-think mode. Latency is about one to two seconds per segment. And how is the accuracy looking? We tested with the JFK speech sample. Eighty six percent word match on the transcription side. The overlap dedup is working correctly, no repeated phrases at chunk boundaries. What about the Chinese and Japanese language support? We have test fixtures for both. The Whisper large v three turbo model handles multilingual well. Chinese character error rate is under five percent on our test samples.

We have completed the WebSocket integration between the orchestration and transcription services. The streaming pipeline is now working end to end on both Apple Silicon and CUDA. The Whisper large v three turbo model handles multilingual well. Chinese character error rate is under five percent on our test samples.

results.reference: Good morning everyone. Let us start our weekly sync. Sarah, can you give us an update on the transcription pipeline? Sure. We have completed the WebSocket integration between the orchestration and transcription services. The streaming pipeline is now working end to end on both Apple Silicon and CUDA. That is great progress. What about the translation module? Translation is working with Ollama locally. We are using Qwen three point five with no-think mode. Latency is about one to two seconds per segment. And how is the accuracy looking? We tested with the JFK speech sample. Eighty six percent word match on the transcription side. The overlap dedup is working correctly, no repeated phrases at chunk boundaries. What about the Chinese and Japanese language support? We have test fixtures for both. The Whisper large v three turbo model handles multilingual well. Chinese character error rate is under five percent on our test samples.
